headline: IGV Investors: Watch Oracle’s Free Cash Flow as the Real Test of AI Capex Economics
summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (NASDAQ:IGV) closed Friday at $88.20, down 16.5% year to date and 18.9% over the past year, despite the broader AI trade still drawing capital. IGV’s slide accelerated this month after top holding Oracle posted its worst week since the 2001 dot-com bust, dropping 19.4% in five sessions on debt ... IGV Investors: Watch Oracle’s Free Cash Flow as the Real Test of AI Capex Economics

headline: Adobe (ADBE) Launches Firefly Foundry to Enable Enterprise Custom AI Model Development
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the AI stocks on Wall Street’s radar. On June 25, Adobe introduced Firefly Foundry, a new platform designed to help enterprises maintain brand consistency by developing and managing custom generative AI models. By training these models on approved brand assets and visual standards, organizations can ensure that AI-generated content […]

headline: Prime Day's New Trick: Convincing Shoppers To Spend More On Products They Didn't Plan To Buy

headline: Adobe: The Four Horsemen Of SaaSpocalypse; Too Much Fear Is An Opportunity
